metadata.description: Open Claude Code plugins from Luminik. Practical agents and skills for AEs, SDRs, and event marketers running pre-event outbound and dinner/side-event invites at B2B trade shows and conferences. Founders doing their own event outbound, welcome too.

plugins.name: event-outbound
plugins.description: Generate validated email and LinkedIn sequences for B2B events. Event, ICP, persona, and sender context in; buyer-first touches out across pre-event, day-of, and post-event motions. Built from 20K+ outbound touches reviewed across 50+ fintech, cybersecurity, and B2B SaaS events that sourced $6M+ in pipeline. Runs inside Claude Code with no extra API key. The bundled validator checks subject length, inbox-preview opener, channel length, illumination question, pronoun ratio, direct CTA, permission-to-send gating, forced event phrasing, and a 10-category cliche blocklist. Includes fully rendered Black Hat USA 2026 and Money20/20 Europe 2026 worked examples plus Singapore Fintech Festival 2026 input fixtures.
